title: Inside India’s AI Impact Summit: Robot fraud, gridlocked roads, and a no-show from Bill Gates
description: India's AI Impact Summit promised to reshape the global AI order. It also featured a stolen robot dog, hours of traffic, and a no-show from Bill Gates.

title: 1 Incredible Artificial Intelligence (AI) Infrastructure Stock to Buy With $150 Right Now
“We Totally Reject Global Governance of AI”: White House Adviser at India AI Impact Summit
description: Rejecting a global AI governance framework, the White House Tech Policy Director, Michael Kratsios, said AI policy should be local and "focused on the needs of particular people" while showcasing the US as a birthplace of AI. The post “We Totally Reject Global Governance of AI”: White House Adviser at India AI Impact Summit appeared first on MEDIANAMA.

title: AI Impact Summit Session Highlights Responsible AI Innovation in Healthcare
description: New Delhi [India], February 23: The session "AI in Healthcare: Navigating Innovation, Ethics, and Regulatory Compliance", organized by UiT The Arctic University of Norway, Founder of Spermotile, moderated a high-profile session at the AI Impact Summit 2026, brought together leading clinicians and AI researchers to discuss the responsible integration of artificial intelligence in healthcare.

title: Safe Pro Group Projects Over 500% Year-Over-Year Q1 2026 Revenue Growth Following U.S. Government Award for AI Edge Processing Systems
